info.name: ExchangeRate-API
info.description:
ExchangeRate-API is a currency exchange rate API providing authoritative daily and intraday foreign exchange rates for 161 currencies. The v6 API surface includes Standard (Latest) rates, Pair conversion, Enriched data (locale, symbol, flag), Historical rates back to 1990, Supported codes, and an API request Quota endpoint. A separate no-key Open Access endpoint (open.er-api.com) provides once-daily rates with attribution.

Contact Support:
 Name: ExchangeRate-API Support
 Email: contact@exchangerate-api.com

variable.description: (Required) Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

request.description: Returns the latest exchange rates from a given base currency to all supported currencies. Update frequency depends on plan tier (daily on Free, hourly on Pro, every 5 minutes on Business / Volume).

response.name: Successful response with conversion rates for the base currency.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Error response (malformed request, invalid key, etc.).

variable.description: (Required) Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the target currency (e.g. EUR).
(Required) Decimal amount to convert (xxxx.xxxx format).

request.description: Returns the exchange rate between a base and a target currency along with the converted amount.

response.name: Successful response with conversion rate and converted amount.

variable.description: (Required) Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the target currency (e.g. EUR).

request.description: Returns the exchange rate between a base and target currency along with enriched target currency metadata (country locale, two-letter country code, currency name, display symbol, flag URL). Only available on Business and Volume plans.

response.name: Successful response with conversion rate and enriched target data.

variable.description: (Required) Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).
(Required) Year for historical data (full four-digit year).
(Required) Month for historical data (1-12, no leading zero).
(Required) Day for historical data (1-31, no leading zero).
(Required) Decimal amount to convert (xxxx.xxxx format).

request.description: Returns historical exchange rates plus converted amounts for the given base currency on the specified date.

response.name: Successful response with historical rates and converted amounts for the given date.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

variable.description: (Required) Your ExchangeRate-API dashboard API key.
(Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).
(Required) Year for historical data (full four-digit year).
(Required) Month for historical data (1-12, no leading zero).
(Required) Day for historical data (1-31, no leading zero).

request.description: Returns historical exchange rates for the given base currency on the specified date. Full currency support from 2021-01-01 onward; 35 currencies are available from 1990-01-01 to 2020-12-31. Only available on Pro, Business, and Volume plans.

response.name: Successful response with historical rates for the given date.

request.description: Returns an array of all supported ISO 4217 currency codes and their full names.

variable.description: (Required) ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the base currency (e.g. USD).

request.description: Returns the latest exchange rates from a base currency via the no-API-key Open Access endpoint (https://open.er-api.com/v6). Requires attribution back to exchangerate-api.com. Updates once daily and is rate limited.
